mapper.sql: id, project_id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, file_ext, object_name, storage_bucket, content_type, file_size, file_hash, status, metadata, preview_supported, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into file_object ( project_id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, file_ext, object_name, storage_bucket, content_type, file_size, file_hash, status, metadata, preview_supported, deleted ) values ( #{projectId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{fileName}, #{fileExt}, #{objectName}, #{storageBucket}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{status}, #{metadata}, #{previewSupported}, 0 )
mapper.select: select from file_object where id = #{fileId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update file_object set deleted = 1, status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{fileId} and deleted = 0
